case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK FKA VS. HABIBA DAJANI ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 200016492)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-10-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK FKA AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK AS TO DEFENDANT DAJANI, HABIBA DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-10-2020
NON SERVICE REPORT (TRANSACTION ID # 200009488) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK FKA AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-10-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
